prompt: Create a portfolio website for Nebula Creative, a design and motion studio. Use Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Feature a morphing 3D organic blob as the hero element, built with React Three Fiber and custom noise-based vertex shaders. Add GSAP ScrollTrigger for cinematic text reveals on scroll. Implement a filterable project gallery with 3D tilt hover effects. Use a warm dark color scheme with coral/orange accents. Full-screen contact section at the bottom.
expected_sections: Studio introduction with GSAP text reveals
expected_3d_features: Morphing blob with noise vertex shader
design_notes: Warm dark theme (#1A1A1A base), coral/orange accents (#FF6B35 range), editorial typography, smooth GSAP ScrollTrigger choreography
